objective: Strengthen design judgment, human-centered reasoning, usability, AI-interface risk reasoning, cognitive accessibility guidance, and legal-design boundary discipline through governed sources.

sources.title: The Design of Everyday Things
limitations: Protected book; no full text stored.

sources.title: Don't Make Me Think, Revisited
limitations: Protected book; no full text stored.

sources.title: Eyetracking Web Usability
limitations: Attention is not comprehension; age and context limit generalization.

sources.title: Dieter Rams: As Little Design as Possible
limitations: Philosophy and visual reference, not a universal standard.

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
sources.author_or_institution: National Institute of Standards and Technology
supports: Voluntary AI risk-management structure and governance vocabulary.

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework: Generative Artificial Intelligence Profile
sources.author_or_institution: National Institute of Standards and Technology
supports: Generative-AI risk identification and risk-treatment considerations.
limitations: Profile complements AI RMF 1.0; not a product specification.

sources.title: Making Content Usable for People with Cognitive and Learning Disabilities
sources.author_or_institution: W3C Cognitive and Learning Disabilities Accessibility Task Force
supports: Cognitive accessibility patterns and supplemental guidance.
limitations: Informative guidance; validate with representative users.

sources.title: Cognitive Accessibility Roadmap and Gap Analysis
sources.author_or_institution: W3C Cognitive and Learning Disabilities Accessibility Task Force
supports: Historical gap framing and research context.
limitations: Working Draft; preserve as historical/foundational context, not current standard.

sources.title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 laying down harmonised rules on artificial intelligence
supports: Transparency instructions for deployers of high-risk systems
Contextual AI interaction and synthetic-content disclosure
does_not_support: Universal numerical confidence score for final users
Early application of unpublished Omnibus changes
limitations: Legal status and pending amendments require live verification before use.
